case_title: GABRIEL DE KELAITA VS. AURORA STUDIOS LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE KELAITA, GABRIEL AS TO DEFENDANT AURORA STUDIOS LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE KELAITA, GABRIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AURORA STUDIOS LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $13,349.58 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,719.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AFFIDAVIT OF GABRIEL DE. KELAITA FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE KELAITA, GABRIEL
